content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line bending right, and the car appears well-centered on the track heading into this right curve.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 22, target = (22 + 5) % 121 = 27
- Target waypoint 27: (7.0100, 1.0258)
- Car: x=6.3167, y=0.6946, heading=7.124°
- dy = 1.0258 - 0.6946 = 0.3312
- dx = 7.0100 - 6.3167 = 0.6933
- bearing = atan2(0.3312, 0.6933) = 25.56°
- delta = 25.56° - 7.124° = 18.44°
- |delta| ≈ 18° → moderate left, use 15° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but target waypoint 27 is still to the left of current heading (delta=+18.4°), so continue with 15° positive steering to follow the waypoint line.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight heading due east (~0-5° heading)",
    "Sharp right curve begins around waypoints 26-32 (x=6.9-7.3, y=0.9-1.7)",
    "After the right curve, track goes west around y=2.7-4.5 then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is nearly centered (0.0008m from center) — excellent position",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on straights; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Need to prepare for right turn (negative steering) starting around WP30-35",
    "Heading is ~7.1° and rising — car is turning left slightly to follow waypoints",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.080, 6.137, 6.200, 6.242, 6.317],
    "y": [0.650, 0.657, 0.670, 0.677, 0.695],
    "yaw": [1.800, 2.716, 4.100, 5.269, 7.124]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP27 at (7.010, 1.026): dy=0.331, dx=0.693, bearing=25.56°, delta=+18.44° → moderate left correction",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
